UserConfig.title: User Configuration
UserConfig.description: Stores user-specific settings including API keys and admin status.

geminiApiKey.description: Encrypted or plain text API key for Gemini

Feedback.title: User Feedback
Feedback.description: Stores user feedback, bug reports, and suggestions.

planSnapshot.description: Optional snapshot of the plan being commented on

/user_configs/{userId}.description: User configuration documents keyed by UID.

/archivedPlans/{planId}.description: Private archived lesson plans for users.
